text_preview:
## Report issued on April 19, 1982, by the Sixth Regional Air Command. Translation below:

“On March 23, 1982, at about 11:00 am, when the P-103 aircraft was carrying out evolutions on the ANÁPOLIS AIRBASE aerodrome, a UFO was observed by several military personnel of that OM.

The object, which could be seen with the naked eye, had a circular shape and was white in color, tending to silver. Through binoculars its shape was the same, but brighter, and the color was sometimes reddish. It was initially seen almost vertically from the Aerodrome, moving in an estimated 280 degrees. The altitude ha
summary: On Mar 23, 1982, military personnel at Anápolis Air Base observed a circular white-to-silver (sometimes reddish) UFO over the aerodrome; an FAB alert aircraft searched to FL500 without success.
